verdict: Reframed the Gap Selling set around amplification instead of full educational packaging. The strongest assets are the sharp opinion line, the 'they want their brain back' recognition post, and the relief-conversation detail.
strengths: Much stronger fit for X as an amplification layer
Clear distinction between sharp takes, recognition, tactics, and story detail
Good bridge back to the VRM Sales Library
Carries the approved voice more cleanly
problems: Still needs Chad taste-check on the sharpest line and story-detail line
Author engagement copy may want real @handles later when posting
required_fixes: Review and rank the strongest live-post candidates
Add real author tags at posting time if used
